Author: DriftlessDigits
Name: Scrooge
Punchline: A gil saved is a gil earned.
Description: "You might say that everythin's for sale here in Ul'dah — as long as you've got the gil." — Momodi Modi
Changelog: SQLite replaces JSON storage for gil tracking data. ConfigWindow reorganized into tabs. Random money quote header in settings. HQ icon in Gil Dashboard.
